name: Old Dominion Freight Line
analysis: Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at $216.7048. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at $220.4144 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry $216.7048, stop $213.9390, target $221.3494. Risk/reward is 1.68:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
